title: Sales & Marketing (No experience required)
description:
🌟 Ready to Break the Routine and Build a Career You’re Excited About? We’re looking for go-getters, dreamers, and doers. If you’re someone who’s driven, excited to learn, and loves a fun, fast-moving environment — we want to meet you. This isn’t your typical 9–5. It’s an opportunity to grow from the ground up, gain real-life experience, and join a community that pushes you to become your best. 🚀

About the Opportunity We work closely with well-known brands to help them grow through creative and strategic marketing projects. As part of our dynamic team, you’ll take on meaningful work, develop valuable skills, and grow faster than you thought possible — all with strong mentorship and support. You don’t need prior experience — just the right mindset and attitude. We’ll guide you from Day 1. 💼

Job Summary

Join a fast-paced marketing team to support brand campaigns, deliver excellent customer experiences, and develop leadership skills through collaboration and creative problem solving.

Responsibilities

  • Collaborate with team members to plan and execute brand and marketing campaigns that support client growth
  • Deliver positive customer interactions that enhance brand reputation and customer satisfaction
  • Participate actively in team brainstorming sessions to generate creative solutions for marketing challenges
  • Develop personal influence, confidence, and leadership skills through hands-on project involvement and mentorship

💎 What’s in It for You

  • 🌍 Gain travel exposure with regional and international opportunities
  • 👥 Receive 1-on-1 mentorship for personal coaching to build confidence and skills
  • 📈 Follow clear career progression paths with defined targets to advance your role
  • 💬 Work within a supportive culture that encourages growth and collaboration
  • 🕒 Enjoy flexible working hours that promote work-life balance
  • 🤑 Earn performance-based incentives as you develop and contribute

Job Details

  • Position: Full-Time
  • Location: Hybrid Remote — Based in Singapore (049842)
  • Schedule: Monday to Friday
  • Start Date: Immediate / Within 1–2 Weeks

🌱 No Experience? No Problem. We hire based on attitude, not background. If you’re excited to learn, grow, and be part of a high-energy team, we’d love to meet you. 👉 Apply now — and let’s see how far you can go.
